overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character wading through a shallow wilderness river and approaching a rustic campsite on the forested bank. The scene features detailed natural environments with rocky riverbed formations, pine forests, and dynamic cloud lighting before transitioning to an intimate campsite exploration.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with rocky bed

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water toward the opposite bank, navigating around submerged rocks

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder sitting in the middle of the river
clear shallow water with visible rocky riverbed beneath
dense stand of tall pine trees lining the riverbank
steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation
tall stone spires visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view wading through a shallow wilderness river. Large rocks emerge from the clear water while pine forests line the banks under a partly cloudy sky. The camera moves steadily forward through the river, navigating around natural obstacles.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverbank transition zone with grassy approach

events.description: exits the shallow river and steps onto the rocky gravel shore

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the river onto the gravel bank and approaching the tree line where a campsite is visible

entered.detail: grassy slope leading up from the water's edge into the forest
weathered canvas tent set up among the trees
old wooden supply wagon with canvas cover parked near the camp

segments.scene_description: The character exits the river onto a gravelly shore and approaches a secluded campsite. A canvas tent and wooden wagon become visible among the pine trees as the camera turns right and ascends the bank. The rocky riverbed gives way to grassy terrain dotted with small plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic wilderness campsite with scattered gear

events.description: slows movement to examine the campsite details and surrounding objects

agents.ego_description: moving slowly around the campsite inspecting the tent, wagon, campfire, and scattered supplies

entered.detail: stone-ringed fire pit with smoldering embers and cooking equipment nearby
small wooden storage chest sitting next to the wagon
stacked wooden crates and boxes near the tent entrance
metal cooking pot hanging near the fire area

segments.scene_description: The camera explores an abandoned wilderness campsite in detail, moving between a weathered canvas tent and a wooden supply wagon. A stone campfire ring sits at the center surrounded by scattered camping gear, crates, and cooking utensils. The scene is set in a clearing among tall pines with the river visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the cool currents of a wilderness river to the intimate details of a secluded forest campsite. It begins by wading through clear, shallow water, navigating around large rocks as pine forests line the banks under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera exits the river, the rocky bed transitions into a gravelly shore and then grassy terrain, ascending the bank toward a canvas tent and wooden wagon nestled among the trees. The scene then opens into a clearing where the camera explores the abandoned camp, moving between the weathered tent and supply wagon. Finally, the view lingers on a stone campfire ring surrounded by scattered crates and cooking utensils, with the river now visible in the background.
